## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Content (event / tutorial)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally with `npm run dev`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Screenshots included (for UI changes)
- [ ] Accessibility considered (semantic HTML, alt text, keyboard navigation)
- [ ] No secrets committed (check `.env.local` is gitignored)
